cv.name: JANE DOE
summary: Engineering leader with 10+ years of experience scaling engineering organizations and building cloud-native infrastructure. Deep background in Kubernetes, observability, and developer tooling.
Hands-on experience with platform engineering, CI/CD, and infrastructure-as-code. Comfortable engaging with staff engineers on architecture and technical trade-offs.
coreSkills: Engineering leadership: led teams of 5-15 engineers across Platform, SRE, and Infrastructure
Cloud-native architecture: Kubernetes (EKS, GKE), Terraform, Helm, service mesh
Observability: OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, structured logging
Delivery excellence: CI/CD pipelines, deployment automation, DORA metrics improvement
keyAchievements: Scaled platform team from 3 to 12 engineers during rapid growth phase
Built internal developer platform that increased deployment frequency 200%
Improved platform availability from 97% to 99.9% through SLO frameworks

jobs.title: Head of Platform Engineering
bullets: Leading platform engineering team of 8, building internal developer platform
Implemented observability stack with OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, and Grafana
Established SLO frameworks improving service availability to 99.9%

jobs.title: Senior SRE
bullets: Operated Kubernetes clusters serving 100K+ concurrent users
Built CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time from hours to minutes

earlierExperience.title: DevOps Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained cloud infrastructure on AWS

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

skills.Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, Docker, Helm, Terraform

paragraphs: I'm writing to apply for the Head of Platform Engineering role at Acme Corp. With 10+ years leading engineering teams and building cloud-native infrastructure, I'm excited about the opportunity to scale your platform organization.

At GreenTech, I built an internal developer platform from scratch that increased deployment frequency 200% and improved availability to 99.9%. I lead a team of 8 engineers across platform, reliability, and infrastructure.
I'd welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience can support Acme Corp's growth.
cl.name: Jane Doe
